name: Spooder-Kid: Brand New World
overview: A boy with special powers is forced to adapt to a new life with his friend in an alternate universe.  At first it seems great, but little does he know, he will have to defend himself and his friend and fight new foes. Go to https://www.youtube.com/@spooder-kid/videos to watch.
